name: self-evolving-harness-starter
description: A minimal, honest self-evolving harness: a Darwin-Godel-Machine-style loop (propose a scaffolding variant -> evaluate -> accept only if it beats the champion on a HELD-OUT eval -> version + record -> repeat) with a reward-hack guard. Bring a task and an eval; it evolves the scaffolding. Lowers the entry barrier to harness engineering.
